description: A ground station is unable to establish a command link with a satellite. An operator must troubleshoot the issue.

nodes.task_description: Verify the ground station's antenna is pointing correctly based on the satellite's predicted ephemeris data.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the antenna pointing is accurate.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the ground station's transmitters and receivers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the primary transmitter is showing a fault code.

nodes.task_description: Switch to the backup transmitter and attempt to re-establish the link with the satellite.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully switches to the backup system and establishes a command link.
